title: Permit Journal UI Canonical Context
implementationRule: Do not invent Adilet legal acts.
Do not treat derived product logic as direct legal requirement.
Do not implement P1/P2 industry templates in MVP.
Do not make signed fields editable after approved.
Do not treat PDF as signed source of truth.
Do not hardcode one retention period for all documents.
implementedCapabilities: Transactional permit creation with canonical document versions and brigade membership
Real-source precheck snapshots and server-side deterministic hashes
Assigned-participant approval, signing, activation, closure, and rejection workflow
NCALayer and mock test-mode signing through generic signing sessions
PDF, evidence package, expiration, retention policy resolution, and archive
API filtering, sorting, pagination, and employee self-service scope
verification: API, web, database, types, and worker typechecks passed
API, web, database, and repository test suites passed
Worker build and Prisma client generation passed
remainingDeploymentChecks: Apply migration to the target database
Verify production NCALayer signing and archive storage configuration
